case_title: NOBLE FIELDS VS. KIM LYNNE DAVIS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL 2ND ADDRESS - MARKET ST - SF, CA FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDS, NOBLE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KIM LYNNE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-30-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD)* COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KIM LYNNE
REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL 1ST ADDRESS - VALMAR TERR - SF, CA FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDS, NOBLE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KIM LYNNE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIELDS, NOBLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DAVIS, KIM LYNNE DEFENDANT'S PETITION IN BANKRUPTCY FILED IN JULY, 2010 RESULTED IN THE DISCHARGE OF ANY PRIOR DEBT OWED TO PLAINTIFF BY THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
